What We Do

Three pillars of our
manufacturing excellence.

01

Bulk Manufacturing

Full-cycle apparel production from raw fabric sourcing to finished garments. Polo shirts, T-shirts, hoodies, sweatshirts — all built to your specification with complete factory-grade quality control.

T-Shirts Polo Hoodies Sweatshirts Oversize Fit
02

Custom Printing

Four printing technologies under one roof. DTF, screen printing, embroidery, and puff printing — each chosen to bring your logo, artwork, or branding to life with crisp, wash-fast results.

DTF Screen Print Embroidery Puff Print
03

Private Label

Launch your own clothing brand under your label. We handle production while you focus on marketing and selling. Custom tags, labels, packaging, and branding — all included in the experience.

Custom Labels Brand Tags Packaging White-label
Why TwoDudez

The standard others
aspire to match.

🏭

In-House Production

Full manufacturing control under one roof — no outsourcing, no middlemen, no surprises in quality.

📐

Low MOQ

Start with as few as 10 pieces on stock items. Custom manufacturing begins at 100 pieces — built for growing brands.

✦

Trend-Forward Design

Oversized fits, premium GSM weights, drop-shoulder cuts — we produce what's selling in streetwear right now.

⚡

Fast Turnaround

Efficient production pipeline with dedicated account management. Deadlines are commitments, not suggestions.

Material Excellence

Fabric that speaks
before you wear it.

Every TwoDudez garment starts with the right fabric. We stock a curated range of GSM weights — each selected for a specific end-use, from lightweight corporate polos to heavyweight streetwear drops.

How It Works

From idea to
doorstep in 5 steps.

A simple, transparent process designed to eliminate guesswork and get your order right — every time.

📋

Inquiry

Share your requirements — fabric preference, fit type, quantity, and design. We respond within 24 hours via WhatsApp, call, or email.

🎨

Design

Our team creates mockups and artwork for your approval. We finalize colour, placement, and print method before production begins.

🏭

Production

In-house manufacturing begins. Fabric cutting, stitching, and printing are handled under full quality supervision at our Dewas facility.

✅

Quality Check

Every piece goes through a strict QC process — stitching inspection, print quality verification, and finishing review before packaging.

🚚

Delivery

Packed and dispatched with care. Pan-India delivery with real-time tracking so you know exactly where your order is at all times.

Our Clientele

Built for everyone
who builds something.

👕

D2C Clothing Brands

Gen Z streetwear drops, lifestyle brands, and independent clothing lines — we're the factory behind your label. Low MOQ lets you test before you scale.

🏢

Corporate Companies

Branded uniforms, team apparel, and merchandise that represents your company professionally. Amazon, Furlenco, JustDial — they trust us.

🎓

Schools & Colleges

Sports jerseys, batch T-shirts, farewell hoodies, and institutional uniforms — bulk orders with consistent sizing and quality across every piece.

🎤

Event Organisers

Fast turnaround on event merchandise, volunteer T-shirts, and promotional apparel. From marathons to music festivals — we deliver on time.

📚

Coaching Institutes

Batch uniforms, teacher T-shirts, and branded apparel that builds your institute's identity. IAS academies to regional coaching chains — all served.

🇮🇳

Government & NGOs

Fit India campaigns, Swachh Bharat initiatives, and state government event apparel. Large-scale orders delivered with compliance and precision.

Our Story

Started by builders,
run by craftsmen.

TwoDudez was founded in 2023 by three partners who saw a gap in the Indian apparel manufacturing space — too many compromises between quality, accessibility, and speed. We started as traders, studied the industry from the inside, and built a manufacturing unit that delivers what most factories promise but rarely provide.

Today, we operate a full-scale production facility in Dewas, MP, backed by a growing dealer network across India. We've partnered with some of the country's most recognizable brands — not because of price, but because of quality and reliability.

Our vision is simple: empower every brand, big or small, to access manufacturing infrastructure that was once only available to the biggest players in the industry. We are proudly Made in India, building for the world.

Factory Dewas, Madhya Pradesh
Corporate Office Indore, Madhya Pradesh
